title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 28 February 2025.

items.title: Gibson and CRKD are releasing new **Les Paul** guitar controllers
bullets: The new guitar controllers work with Fortnite Festival and some legacy Rock Band and Guitar Hero games

items.title: **Gex Trilogy** trailer confirms a summer release window
bullets: The compliation consists of all three GEX games

items.title: Indie studio introduces a unique temperature-based pricing system for its snowman game
bullets: A Good Snowman is Hard to Build is a puzzle game that was originally released in 2015, and is usually priced at $14.99.

However, to celebrate the game’s 10th anniversary, the game’s price will change every hour on itch.io depending on the current temperature in London, according to weather forecast website OpenWeather.

items.title: Games being added to the **GOG Preservation Program**
bullets: The program is a commitment from GOG to ensure each game remains playable on modern PCs for as long as possible.
Lego Batman: The Video Game
Lego Batman 2: DC Super Heroes
Lego Batman 3: Beyond Gotham
Lego City Undercover (new to GOG)
Lego Indiana Jones: The Original Adventures
Lego Indiana Jones 2: The Adventure Continues
The Lego Movie Video Game (new to GOG)
The Lego Movie 2 Video Game (new to GOG)
The Lego Ninjago Video Game (new to GOG)
Lego Pirates of the Caribbean: The Video Game
Lego The Lord of the Rings
FEAR Platinum ("by next month" "to ensure Molonith's legacy")

items.title: A new 2D game based on **Terminator 2** (Terminator 2D: No Fate) is coming in September
bullets: PS4/5, Xbox One /S/X, Switch, and PC (via Steam and the Epic Games Store) on September 5

items.title: **Pokémon Champions** announced for Nintendo Switch and mobile
bullets: The new battle-focused game is being developed by Pokémon Works and Game Freak
The game will connect to Pokémon Home and will be compatible with Pokémon Scarlet and Violet

items.title: **Palworld** studio is giving developers the day off to play Monster Hunter Wilds
For the first time, **Nintendo** is delisting a game (Super Formation Soccer, SNES) from the Switch Online retro library
Metro dev **4A Games** rebrands to Reburn with new game reveal
bullets: Reburn is pivoting away from Metro to a new IP, the sci-fi shooter La Quimera

items.title: EA deploys various **Command & Conquer** games' source code to the masses
bullets: Command & Conquer: Red Alert, Command & Conquer: Generals' Zero Hour expansion, Command & Conquer: Renegade, and a remastered collection of the first two games. Mod support for those games—and Command & Conquer: Kane's Wrath and Command & Conquer: Red Alert 3—has also been included.
Shared under GPL v3 license. Game files must be provided and are not included as part of the license.

items.title: **Tekken 8** sales punch up to 3 million copies in first year
